questions.question: Does decryptNip17Message accept kind-15 wrapped events in addition to kind-14?
questions.actionable_check: Read the kind check in crypto.ts. Verify it accepts both kind 14 and 15. Run nip17.test.ts to confirm kind-15 test passes.
questions.pass_criteria: Kind check allows both 14 and 15, rejects other kinds

questions.question: Does processGiftWrapEvent accept and ingest kind-15 messages with the correct kind value?
questions.actionable_check: Read processGiftWrapEvent in service.ts. Verify it checks for kind 14 OR 15 and passes dmResult.kind (not hardcoded 14).
evidence_required: Source code of kind check and ingest call
questions.pass_criteria: Accepts kind 14 || 15, passes actual kind to ingestIncomingMessage

questions.question: Does buildKind15MediaJson correctly convert kind-15 tags (file-type, size, dim, blurhash, x) to imeta format while ignoring thumb tag?
questions.actionable_check: Read buildKind15MediaJson function. Run the kind-15 service tests to verify tag mapping and thumb exclusion.
evidence_required: Test results showing correct tag mapping
questions.pass_criteria: All kind-15 tags correctly mapped to imeta equivalents, thumb tag excluded

questions.question: Does ingestIncomingMessage handle kind-15 with empty content by returning null mediaJson?
questions.actionable_check: Run the empty content test case for kind-15.
evidence_required: Test result for empty content kind-15
questions.pass_criteria: Empty content produces null/undefined mediaJson, not a crash

mandatory_questions.question: Do all existing tests pass without regressions?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run npm test and verify all test suites pass.

mandatory_questions.question: Is existing kind-14 behavior unchanged? Do existing NIP-17 encryption tests still pass?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run nip17.test.ts and verify all existing round-trip tests pass. Run service.test.ts and verify existing ingest tests pass.
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All pre-existing NIP-17 and ingest tests pass unchanged
